rulings.Case Title: PATRICK J. LYNCH et al VS. AC AND S, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Non-Party Raymond David Dascenzo, Sr.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Ford Motor Company¿s motion to compel the deposition of non-party Raymond David Dascenzo, Sr. is denied. Assuming without deciding that proper notice was given for the subpoena on Mr. Dascenzo and the subpoena did not call for personal records for which a notice or privacy rights is required, the motion is denied due to lack of good cause to take the deposition. The conclusory statement in paragraphs 3 and 4 of Ms. Fiorentino¿s declaration are insufficient to overcome the objections asserted to the deposition notice. (220/HEK)
